📚 Getting Course Materials

The textbook PDF chapters will be shared through Zulip in our class channel. Download the relevant chapter before each week's study session.

📖 Textbook

{{TEXTBOOK_INFO}}

How to Access Materials

  1. Join Zulip Class Channel

    Check your email or Canvas for the Zulip invitation link. Join the course channel.

  2. Download Chapter PDFs

    Find the pinned messages or announcements with textbook chapter PDFs. Download the relevant chapter for your study session.

  3. Access Weekly Learning Sheets

    Visit this website's home page to access the learning sheets for each week's materials.

🤖 Using DeepSeek for AI-Assisted Learning

DeepSeek is a powerful AI assistant that's free to use and excellent for studying.

Why DeepSeek?
  • Free — No subscription required
  • PDF Upload — Directly upload textbook chapters
  • Strong Reasoning — Excellent at step-by-step explanations
  • Long Context — Can process entire chapters at once

Getting Started with DeepSeek

  1. Create an Account

    Go to chat.deepseek.com and sign up for a free account.

  2. Upload Your Textbook Chapter

    Click the 📎 attachment button in the chat interface. Select the textbook chapter PDF you downloaded from Zulip. Wait for it to upload completely.

  3. Enable Deep Think Mode (Recommended)

    For complex topics, enable "Deep Think" mode. This gives more thorough, step-by-step reasoning.

  4. Start Your Study Session

    Use the prompts from our weekly learning sheets. Copy a prompt, paste it into DeepSeek, and start learning!

Example Prompts to Try

Based on the textbook chapter I uploaded, explain:
1. The main concept introduced in this chapter
2. Give me a simple example and walk through it step by step.
I'm confused about [topic]. Can you:
1. Explain the intuition in simple terms
2. Show me a worked example
3. Give me a practice problem to try
⚠️ Pro Tip

Always start a new chat session when uploading a new chapter to avoid context confusion. DeepSeek works best when it has clear, focused context.

💻 Cursor IDE Setup (Optional)

For students who prefer a coding environment with integrated AI, Cursor is an excellent option.

Installation

  1. Download Cursor

    Get Cursor from cursor.com. It's available for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  2. Network Configuration (China)

    If you're in mainland China and need to use advanced models:

    • Cursor Settings → Search "HTTP" → Set HTTP Compatibility mode to HTTP 1.1
    • Open Settings (Cmd/Ctrl + ,) → Search "proxy" → Configure your proxy settings
  3. Select Agent Mode

    Switch to Agent mode in the AI pane (bottom left of chat). This enables more powerful multi-step reasoning.

🎯 Choosing the Right Model

Different AI models excel at different tasks. Here's a guide for the 2025 landscape:

DeepSeek Free
Best free option. Strong reasoning, supports PDF upload. Ideal for most students.
Claude 4.5
Top-tier explanation and coding. Best for complex topics with step-by-step clarity.
Gemini 3.0 Pro
PhD-level reasoning + 2M context. Great for processing entire textbook sections.
GPT-5.1
Balanced all-rounder. Good general assistant for varied tasks.
💡 Recommendation

Start with DeepSeek — it's free and powerful enough for this course. If you need more capabilities, consider Cursor with Claude for coding tasks.

✨ Learning Tips

The Right Way to Use AI

  • Ask specific questions — "Explain step 3 of this argument" beats "explain this"
  • Request examples — Concrete examples solidify abstract concepts
  • Challenge yourself first — Try problems before asking AI for solutions
  • Verify understanding — Ask AI to quiz you on concepts

Study Group Strategy

In your study groups, try using different AI models. This creates diversity in explanations and approaches, leading to richer discussions.

The 5W2H Framework

Structure your questions using this framework for better AI responses:

  • What — What is concept X?
  • Why — Why does this property hold?
  • When — When should I apply technique A vs. technique B?
  • Where — Where in this argument do we use assumption Y?
  • Who — Who developed this idea, and what motivated it?
  • How — How do I convert representation A into representation B?
  • How much — How much does parameter X affect the result?
🎓 Remember

The goal isn't to outsource thinking to AI — it's to use AI as a patient tutor that helps you understand. Always aim to internalize the knowledge so you can solve problems on your own.
